items.label: Electrification
items.title: Electrification
items.description: The world needs more power with lower emissions. As a global technology leader in electrical distribution and management, we bring electrification solutions together to accelerate decarbonization and increase energy efficiency.
items.alt: Technician in safety gear working in an industrial facility

items.label: Automation
items.title: Automation
items.description: Digital transformation is reshaping how industries operate. Our automation platforms connect machines, data, and people to improve productivity, reliability, and safety across complex operations.
items.alt: Automated manufacturing line in a modern factory

items.label: Motors and Drives
items.title: Motors and Drives
items.description: From heavy industry to precision applications, advanced motor and drive systems deliver the torque, control, and efficiency needed to power critical infrastructure worldwide.

items.label: Power Conversion and Control
items.title: Power Conversion and Control
items.description: Reliable power conversion technologies help stabilize grids, protect assets, and enable smarter energy flows from generation through transmission and distribution.
items.alt: Electrical substation and power control systems

items.label: Renewable Power
items.title: Renewable Power
items.description: Wind, solar, and hybrid renewable solutions are scaling faster than ever. We help operators integrate clean generation while maintaining grid stability and performance.

items.label: Robotics
items.title: Robotics
items.description: Intelligent robotics systems extend human capability in demanding environments, combining sensing, motion control, and software to automate tasks with precision.
items.alt: Robotic arm operating in an industrial workspace
